content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_ldw
GO
/*
SELECT c.year, c.month,
vr.registration_date, 
v.vin, v.model, v.model_year, v.make, v.electric_range, v.longitude, v.latitude,
l.country, l.city, l.state, l.postal_code
FROM
silver.vw_vehicle_registration vr
INNER JOIN silver.vehicle v ON (vr.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id)
INNER JOIN silver.location l ON (vr.location_id = l.location_id)
INNER JOIN silver.calendar c ON (CAST(vr.registration_date AS DATE) = c.date) 
WHERE c.year = '2024' and c.month = '06'
ORDER BY v.vin, vr.registration_date
GO
*/

EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '01' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '02' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '03' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '04' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '05' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '06' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '07' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '08' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '09' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '10' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '11' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2024', '12' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2025', '01' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2025', '02' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2025', '03' GO
EXEC gold.usp_gold_vehicle_registration_by_year_and_month '2025', '04' GO
